The reader module has detected more than one card of the same rank and suit on the table.

The reader module has detected the same physical card on more than one antenna at the same time. This usually indicates a problem with the physical layout of antenna cables. Ensure any excess cable is coiled on top of each player antenna, not with other antenna cables. Hole cards may be reported incorrectly, or not at all until this has been corrected.
